subject: [VNFSDK] Use common postgres for vnfsdk
commit_message:
[VNFSDK] Use common postgres for vnfsdk

Use common postgres for vnfsdk

Issue-ID: OOM-2868
Signed-off-by: Abdelmuhaimen Seaudi <abdelmuhaimen.seaudi@orange.com>
